# Vault index

Catalog of every page. Format: `- [[<type>/<title>]] — short one-line hook`.

<!-- Example inside a comment: - [[summaries/example-should-be-ignored]] -->

## Summaries

- [[summaries/alpha]] — the base article

## Entities

- [[entities/acme]] — the organization

## Concepts

- [[concepts/orphan-note]] — an orphan
- [[concepts/ghostpage]] — MISSING FILE (index_drift: missing_file)

## Overviews

- [[overviews/topic]] — the hub

## Comparisons

- [[comparisons/broken]] — has a broken link

## Synthesis

- [[synthesis/badfm]] — invalid frontmatter
